e2e-a11y
Playwright + axe-core/playwright
ARTEFACTS: uploaded on always()
REPORTING: GHA PR annotations

visual
Playwright visual regression
NON-BLOCKING: continue-on-error
GATED BASELINE UPDATE: workflow_dispatch only

integration
vitest + real Postgres via services container
HERMETIC: per-job DB, never shared dev instance
STAGE 1 — Fast checks (parallel, no DB, no browser)

span.p:
FLAKINESS POLICY
retries: 1 (absorbs runner jitter)
quarantine: >2% flake → runs but doesn't block merge
escape valve: >30 days → delete or fix
